title: Chewy Uruguayan Lamb Stir-fry
description: This dish features a fresh and chewy lamb stir-fry with a touch of vegan-friendly ingredients for post-workout recovery.

ingredients.name: Broccoli Florets
ingredients.notes: Stable in high heat, adds crunchiness

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: To balance flavors and add freshness

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add chil flakes and stir fry for about 1 minute.
Add luquillo roots, lentils, broccoli florets to the wok.
Stir-fry all ingredients together for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Mix in lemon juice and season with salt if needed.
Serve hot as a lunch dish.
